description: Triggers when user needs to implement a sitemap.xml in a Next.js app, including hreflang alternates, XSL styling, or sitemap index
should_trigger: Add a sitemap to my Next.js app
Generate XML sitemap with hreflang for multilingual site
Create a sitemap for my IT/EN/CZ website
Sitemap index for a large Next.js site with many pages
Add XSL styling to make my sitemap human-readable
Include dynamic CMS pages in my sitemap
should_not_trigger: Add meta tags to my pages
Analyze my existing sitemap for errors
